Metadata.title: Silas Afra
Metadata.description: Professional, tailored websites that help your business stand out. We turn ideas into a solid digital presence with modern design and solid UX—so you can reach the right audience with a site built for your goals.

Header.tagline: Focused on scalable digital solutions, with emphasis on performance and user experience.

About.title: About me
About.p1: Fullstack developer focused on building digital systems and products with strong performance, scalability, and user experience.
About.p2: I build end-to-end applications, connecting front-end, back-end, and architecture to deliver solid, efficient products that are ready to grow.
About.p3: My goal is to ship well-structured solutions that meet business needs with quality, consistency, and a long-term mindset.

Contact.heading: Get in touch!
Contact.emailSubject: Inquiry: Front-end development & UX design services
Contact.emailBody:
Hi Silas,

I’d like to learn more about your front-end development and UX design services. Please get in touch so we can discuss the details.

Thanks,
[Your name]

Portfolio.title: Projects
Portfolio.intro: A sample of shipped work—digital products across operations, e-commerce, logistics, and institutional sites, built for scale and a solid experience for users and admins.

items.name: KononiaOne
items.description: Church management software that brings members, groups, scheduling, communication, and finances together in one platform—helping leadership run operations with clarity, automation, and room to grow.

items.name: Menuplus
items.description: Restaurant management system that unifies menu, orders, day-to-day operations, and service in one place—streamlining workflows and improving efficiency.

items.name: On Air Parking
items.description: Digital parking platform to search, compare, and book spaces across locations—fast, accessible, and efficient for travel and city trips.

items.name: Blippy
items.description: Air travel product that combines search, price tracking, and deal discovery so travelers can find better-value flights more quickly.

items.name: Telecarga
items.description: Logistics platform for shipment management, real-time tracking, and delivery optimization—more control, speed, and reliability across transport operations.

items.name: Fhop Store
items.description: E-commerce experience covering product sales, order management, and checkout—an end-to-end storefront with a clear brand story.

items.name: CAPEF
items.description: Institutional site for a supplementary pension provider—plans, investments, benefits, and governance communicated with clarity and trust for participants.
